daily.today_energy: The universe is giving you permission to slow down and actually listen to what your intuition's been trying to tell you. Mercury's got your back—trust the whispers.
daily.love: Someone's noticing the quiet confidence you've been building lately. Whether it's new or existing, the vibe shift is real. Let yourself be seen without overthinking it.
daily.career: Your attention to detail is about to pay off in ways you weren't expecting. Don't downplay what you've been putting in—the energy you're sending is magnetic right now.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness today. Moving with intention rather than intensity will actually energize you more. Listen to what feels nourishing, not just what's productive.

weekly.overview: Mercury's vibes are shifting your perspective this week, Virgo. You're stepping into a more intuitive version of yourself—trust those gut feelings even when they don't make logical sense. This is your moment to blend analysis with magic.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering something soft about vulnerability. Whether you're coupled up or solo, there's an invitation to let people see the real you—messy thoughts and all. Connection deepens when you drop the perfectionist armor.
weekly.career: Your energy's calling you to speak up about ideas you've been sitting on. This week favors bold conversation and creative problem-solving. Don't dim your light waiting for permission—your contributions matter more than you think.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness over hustle. Focus on nourishing rituals that feel good rather than punishing ones. Whether it's quality sleep, movement that brings joy, or good food—prioritize what actually fuels you.
